spec.description: Comprehensive service monitoring for readio-cloud — RPS, latency, error rate, memory, concurrency, and uptime.

spec.title: P95 Latency
spec.description: 95th percentile HTTP request duration grouped by route (5m window)

spec.title: Memory Usage
spec.description: Process memory usage (sys bytes) using IEC binary units

spec.title: Concurrency (Goroutines)
spec.description: Number of active goroutines over time

spec.title: Error Rate (5xx)
spec.description: 5xx error rate as a fraction of total requests. Shows 0 when no traffic.

spec.title: Requests Per Second (RPS)
spec.description: HTTP request rate grouped by route.

spec.title: Upstream Error Rate (by provider)
spec.description: Upstream error rate by provider (error_class != none). Use to detect third-party API outages (Apple, PodcastIndex, Groq).

spec.title: ASR Relay (by provider & status)
spec.description: ASR relay request rate split by provider and HTTP status class. Compare Groq vs Cloudflare reliability.

spec.expr: sum by (provider, mode, status_class) (rate(readio_cloud_asr_relay_requests_total{env="$env", service_version=~"$service_version"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)

spec.title: Upstream Cache Status
spec.description: Upstream request rate by cache_status (hit/miss/stale/bypass). High miss rate → upstream API costs increase.

spec.title: Disk Free %
spec.description: Free space as a percentage of total disk. Watch when below 20% — configure a Grafana alert rule for automated notification.

spec.title: Storage Size
spec.description: SQLite DB, WAL, and transcript assets size over time. Rising WAL means checkpointing is not keeping up.

spec.title: readio-cloud Service Dashboard
